headline: Defamation Suits Against Media Total RM580 Million in 2025
context: Politicians and business figures filed defamation suits totalling RM580 million against media organizations in 2025.

cards.big: RM580 million in defamation suits filed against media in 2025
cards.sub: Strategic lawsuits increasingly used to silence investigative journalism

cards.big: 45 defamation suits filed by politicians against media outlets
cards.sub: Average claim RM12 million creating existential threat for small newsrooms

cards.big: Malaysiakini faces 3 active suits totalling RM120 million
cards.sub: Legal defence costs of RM2.8 million annually consume editorial resources

cards.big: Malaysia has no anti-SLAPP legislation to protect against strategic litigation
cards.sub: Bar Council proposed SLAPP protection bill in 2024 not yet tabled

cards.big: Defamation suits test whether legal costs can silence journalism without convictions
RM580 million in defamation suits against media. Legal costs function as prior restraint on reporting.
